description: Novel Prep Math 5 placement — 20 constructed-response items from Part I of Placement_Middle_Level.tex.

brand.trust_line: Responses are saved for teacher review. Score bands follow the printed middle-level placement guide (16/20 to advance).
brand.trust_line_zh: 作答已保存供教师批阅。分数区间与纸质初中段分班测试说明一致（当前档位建议 16/20 及以上晋级）。

score_band_rubric.title: Below Math 5 readiness
score_band_rubric.headline: Build foundational arithmetic and number sense.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 建议先巩固基础算术与数感。
score_band_rubric.summary: Printed guide: fewer than 12 correct in Part I suggests remediation before Math 5 placement.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方说明一致：Part I 正确题数不足 12 题时建议先补强基础。
highlights: Focus on addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division fluency.
Review fractions, decimals, and perimeter/area basics.
Teacher should grade written work using the printable answer key.

score_band_rubric.title: Borderline Math 5
score_band_rubric.headline: Near Math 5 readiness — short targeted support.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 接近 Math 5 门槛，建议短期针对性支持。
score_band_rubric.summary: Borderline band on Part I; teacher review of work quality is especially important.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: Part I 边缘区间；建议教师结合书写过程综合判断。
highlights: Target missed items from this 20-question band.
Re-take or continue to Part II only after teacher confirms readiness.
Use the printable test for full five-band progression.

score_band_rubric.title: Math 5 ready
score_band_rubric.headline: Strong Math 5/4 readiness on this band.
score_band_rubric.headline_zh: 在本档位表现达到 Math 5 准备度。
score_band_rubric.summary: Printed guide: 16+ correct in Part I supports Math 5 placement; consider Math 6 band when appropriate.
score_band_rubric.summary_zh: 与官方说明一致：Part I 达 16 题及以上支持 Math 5 分班；可继续评估 Math 6 档位。
highlights: Celebrate growth and maintain computational fluency.
Optional: take Math 6 placement when school recommends the next band.
Teacher grading of constructed responses confirms final placement.
